# Test mcp2go with JSON schemas
#
# This test generates Go code from JSON schemas

# Create a user schema
-- user_schema.json --
{
  "type": "object",
  "description": "User account information",
  "properties": {
    "id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Unique user identifier"
    },
    "username": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "User's username",
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 20
    },
    "email": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "User's email address"
    },
    "age": {
      "type": "integer",
      "description": "User's age"
    },
    "active": {
      "type": "boolean",
      "description": "Whether the user is active"
    },
    "roles": {
      "type": "array",
      "description": "User's roles",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "createdAt": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time",
      "description": "Account creation timestamp"
    }
  },
  "required": ["id", "username", "email"]
}

# Generate code from JSON schema
exec go run .. -type jsonschema user_schema.json
stdout 'Auto-detected input type: jsonschema'
stdout 'Generated: userschema.go'

# Check the generated file structure
exec cat userschema.go
stdout 'package generated'
stdout 'type UserSchema struct'
stdout 'ID string `json:"id"`'
stdout 'Username string `json:"username"`'
stdout 'Email string `json:"email"`'
stdout 'Age \*int `json:"age,omitempty"`'
stdout 'Active \*bool `json:"active,omitempty"`'
stdout 'Roles \[\]string `json:"roles,omitempty"`'
stdout 'CreatedAt \*time.Time `json:"createdAt,omitempty"`'

# Check time import is added for date-time format
stdout 'import \('
stdout '"time"'

# Test enum schema
-- status_schema.json --
{
  "type": "string",
  "description": "Order status",
  "enum": ["pending", "processing", "completed", "cancelled"]
}

exec go run .. status_schema.json
stdout 'Generated: statusschema.go'
exec cat statusschema.go
stdout 'type StatusSchema string'
stdout 'const \('
stdout 'StatusSchemaPending StatusSchema = "pending"'
stdout 'StatusSchemaProcessing = "processing"'
stdout 'StatusSchemaCompleted = "completed"'
stdout 'StatusSchemaCancelled = "cancelled"'

# Test array schema
-- tags_schema.json --
{
  "type": "array",
  "description": "List of tags",
  "items": {
    "type": "string"
  }
}

exec go run .. tags_schema.json
stdout 'Generated: tagsschema.go'
exec cat tagsschema.go
stdout 'type TagsSchema \[\]string'

# Test nested object schema
-- address_schema.json --
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "street": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "city": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "lat": {
          "type": "number"
        },
        "lng": {
          "type": "number"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

exec go run .. address_schema.json
stdout 'Generated: addressschema.go'
exec cat addressschema.go
stdout 'type AddressSchema struct'
stdout 'Street \*string'
stdout 'City \*string'
! stdout 'Location.*struct' # Should not generate inline structs for now
